# Demo: Sift Account Defense

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Safety for Users, Fearless Growth for Online Brands

Account takeover (or ATO)—when a bad actor uses stolen credentials to access a trusted user’s account—is among the fastest growing types of fraud. Watch this demo to discover how to block account fraud and account takeovers with Sift Account Defense.

### See Account Defense in Action

Watch Demo

Watch Demo

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
